channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Founders Fund Appoints Former OpenAI Executive Ryan Beiermeister as Partner
item.description: Ryan Beiermeister has joined Founders Fund as a partner, marking a significant move in the venture capital space. Her appointment follows her tenure at OpenAI, where she served as VP of Product Policy...

item.title: ACT-WAZALENDO advocates for political reform and economic growth in Zanzibar
item.description: The leader of ACT-WAZALENDO, Othman Masoud Othman, has called on Zanzibaris to embrace a reconciliation agreement with the ruling party CCM. This deal aims to end decades of electoral disputes and pol...

item.title: British Widow Sues Luxury Hotel Over Husband's Spa Fire Death
item.description: A British widow, Rachel Barnes, is taking legal action against the Jaal Ryad Resort Hotel in Marrakech for over KSh 87 million after her husband, Anthony Barnes, died in a spa fire during a business t...

item.title: The Decline of Politeness in Modern Society
item.description: The article explores the changing norms of social behaviour, highlighting how rudeness has evolved from face-to-face interactions to anonymous online communication. It critiques the decline in traditi...

item.title: Delft police investigate two rape cases, seek public assistance
item.description: South African police in Delft are appealing for public assistance to identify two men accused of raping a minor and a young woman. The incidents, reported in May and June 2026, involved suspects who a...

item.title: FIFA adds championship rings to 2026 World Cup celebrations
item.description: FIFA has introduced a new tradition for the 2026 World Cup, where the winning team will receive specially designed championship rings alongside the iconic trophy and gold medals. This marks the first ...

item.title: Pakistan cricketer Mohammad Nawaz faces three-month ineligibility for doping violation
item.description: Mohammad Nawaz, a key Pakistan cricketer, has been sanctioned by the ICC for breaching anti-doping regulations. The 32-year-old tested positive for Carboxy-THC after a match against the Netherlands in...

item.title: Federal Government Seizes 48 Properties Linked to Ex-AGF Malami via Court Order
item.description: The Economic and Financial Crimes Commission (EFCC) has successfully secured the final forfeiture of 48 properties linked to former Attorney-General of the Federation and Minister of Justice, Abubakar...

item.title: A Friend's Uncomfortable Truth: Declining a Political Endorsement
item.description: The article addresses the dilemma of declining to endorse a friend for a political position despite their personal bond. A reader seeks guidance on how to tactfully refuse to support a candidate they ...

item.title: New Canberra United owners commit to long-term future with plans for training base and men's team
item.description: Canberra United's new owners, Australian Sports Group (ASG), have outlined an ambitious vision for the club after securing its future in the A-League Women competition. Following the takeover, ASG con...

item.title: Cape Flats Residents Resist Extortion Syndicates Amid Police Action and Inquiry
item.description: Residents in Cape Flats are confronting extortion syndicates targeting spaza shops, following a Somali shop owner's alleged murder after refusing to pay protection fees. Police arrested a suspected sy...

item.title: University of Venda's Convocation Election Mired in Allegations and Legal Disputes
item.description: The University of Venda's convocation election has devolved into a contentious political battle, with candidates and supporters trading accusations of voter exclusion, procedural unfairness, and backr...

item.title: Stakeholders Endorse Commonwealth Recommendations to Resolve Tanzania's Political Crisis
item.description: Stakeholders from civil society organizations in Tanzania have endorsed the Commonwealth's 30-60-90-day roadmap to resolve the country's political crisis. The recommendations include releasing detaine...

item.title: iran and us escalate gulf tensions with renewed attacks on each other's facilities
item.description: iran has launched fresh attacks on american military facilities in the gulf following a sixth consecutive day of us strikes on iranian targets. the us military stated it conducted airstrikes on irania...

item.title: U.S. Revives Controversial Rule Affecting Green Card Applicants
item.description: The Trump administration has revived a controversial public charge rule that makes it harder for immigrants relying on government benefits to obtain a U.S. green card. This policy, which targets appli...

item.title: Businessman Gifts Luxury Land Rover to Wife for Baby Girl's Birth
item.description: Juli Matei, a Kenyan businessman, surprised his wife with a brand-new 2023 Land Rover Defender worth approximately KSh 17 million to celebrate the birth of their baby girl. The lavish gift, presented ...

item.title: BARMM Workers Receive P50 Daily Wage Increase
item.description: The Department of Labor and Employment (DOLE) has approved a significant wage increase for workers in the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao (BARMM), with a total of P50 per day allocated...

item.title: Calgary Faces $526M Annual Investment Need to Meet Affordable Housing Targets
item.description: Calgary city councilors are being presented with three funding options to address the city's affordable housing crisis. The briefing note outlines annual investment requirements of $93 million, $214 m...

item.title: ntel Expands into Digital Infrastructure and Real Estate with New Initiatives
item.description: ntel has launched a series of new ventures focused on digital infrastructure, connectivity, and real estate development. The company unveiled Beam, Titan, and Eden as key initiatives under its integra...

item.title: Vicky Kaushal and Katrina Kaif Celebrate Katrina's 43rd Birthday with Family and Fans
item.description: Vicky Kaushal shared an adorable photo of his wife Katrina Kaif's 43rd birthday celebration on Instagram, captioning it 'Jaan Ka Janamdin' (My love's birthday). The couple, married in December 2021, o...
